_publications._publicationTitle: Development of CAR-T cell therapy for NF1/SWN-related nerve sheath tumor treatment.

_contextSnippet: The indel frequencies were approximately 70% for TGFBR2 and nearly 60% for PDCD1
details: Successfully measured indel frequencies of approximately 70% for TGFBR2 and nearly 60% for PDCD1 gene editing
